messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences. Watch for tickets that are polite on the surface but negative underneath, and for ambiguous categories — escalate (needs_human=true) when unsure.

Subject: Small question about the export format (third try)

Hope you're having a good week! Just a small thing — I asked twice before about why exported dates are in US format regardless of workspace locale, and haven't heard back. I'm sure you're busy, but it's starting to feel like these emails go into a void. Could someone take a look?

response.content: {"category":"how_to","priority":"medium","sentiment":"negative","needs_human":true,"draft_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about how to — we're on it and will follow up shortly."}
